sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.75b (beta): UI polish — the S / A / N, ET candidate, and Extra Time results-table header labels are now vertically centered in the header row, each with its '?' tooltip centered horizontally below the label. Follow-up to 1.7.74b. Carries all of 1.7.74b/1.7.73b (converged S:0 A:0 copy fix + S / A / N tooltip) and earlier.
